metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by GnarlySoft AI

plugins.name: schedule
plugins.description: Repeating prompt schedules with configurable stop conditions and cron scheduling

plugins.description: Interact with Outline knowledge base API - documents, collections, comments, shares, and more

plugins.description: Gnarlysoft-branded Excalidraw diagram creator with dark mode purple theme

plugins.name: m365-personal
plugins.description: Query your personal Microsoft 365 data — Outlook email, calendar, Teams chats, and presence status

plugins.name: microsoft
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 and Azure administration — M365 via Graph API, Azure via Resource Manager API

plugins.name: nano-banana
